SELECT event, date_part(['year'], event) AS event_year FROM timestamps WHERE date_part(['month'], event) = 12;
SELECT date_part(['year', 'month'], MAX(event)) AS latest_date FROM timestamps;
CREATE TABLE events (event_id INTEGER, event_time TIMESTAMP);
INSERT INTO events VALUES (1, TIMESTAMP '1995-10-30 14:23:00'), (2, TIMESTAMP '1999-11-11 17:45:00');
SELECT e.event_id, date_part(['day'], e.event_time) AS event_day FROM events e JOIN timestamps t ON e.event_time < t.event;
WITH event_data AS (SELECT event AS ts FROM timestamps) SELECT date_part(['year', 'month', 'day'], (SELECT MAX(ts) FROM event_data)) AS max_event_date_part;
SELECT date_part(['year', 'month'], event), COUNT(*) FROM timestamps GROUP BY date_part(['year', 'month'], event);
SELECT DISTINCT date_part(['month'], event) AS distinct_month FROM timestamps ORDER BY month;
SELECT date_part(['year'], event), COUNT(*) AS events_count FROM timestamps GROUP BY 1 HAVING events_count > 1;
